title: You Came Too Late
writer: Kostas Asimakopoulos, Alexandre Dumas fils, Nestoras Matsas
actors: Eleni Hatziargyri, Andreas Barkoulis, Dionysis Papagiannopoulos
plot: A woman who lives in sin falls madly in love with a young man from a good family. But from the moment their love becomes known, the complications begin.
